title: Deep Space
body:
### Update: this mod is incompatible with Create 6 and incompatible with VS 2.4+. Recommended to check out [Genesis](https://modrinth.com/mod/vs-genesis) instead, which contains a continuation of the main features from this mod.

Adds some blocks to help with your space travels. Currently features:
- Void Engine, for fast travel through space
- Nav Projector, for finding your way through wormholes
- More features planned!

Watch the ponders to learn how to use.
